name: Mineshaft
flavor: High Noon — abandoned mine tunnels riddle the Territory. Reskin of the Teleporter.
summary: Activate at the end of a Move in contact (no enemy also touching): place your Hand in contact with any other Mineshaft in play. This immediately ends your Move. Dynamite or a Cannon Blast touching a Mineshaft may be sent through just before it goes off.

effects.text: Relocate to any other Mineshaft in play; ends the Move.
